intro: Macrolenes echinulata, also known as Java tea or Java apple, is a plant species native to Indonesia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and research has shown that it possesses health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of Macrolenes echinulata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other polyphenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Java tea is commonly prepared as an herbal infusion or a tincture, and is traditionally consumed as a beverage to aid in digestion and support overall health.
